Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Erika McCartney's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement with defendant Whitmore Family Enterprises, LLC is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Moving party to prepare form of order. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
